notes: This ledger is the durable resume state for the Ralph source-spec refresh loop.
Current code in this worktree is the source of truth for source-backed specs.
Future/target specs must not be rewritten as current-code specs without an explicit decision.

queue.title: Project and Workflow source-backed specs
queue.reason: High staleness risk: Project and Workflow code changed heavily after the source-spec cron stopped. Preserve intentional future/target workflow specs where applicable.

queue.title: Signals, debug, and runtime observability telemetry specs
queue.reason: Telemetry and staleness-signal implementation landed after many source-backed specs were generated.

queue.title: Skills, context build, runtime/profile/plugin surfaces
queue.reason: Built-in skill creator, context inspector, native debug tooling, and plugin/profile changes may have moved source behavior.

queue.title: Gateway, channel, CLI, PTY, and operator specs
queue.reason: upstream/dev contains recent PTY/debug tooling work and gateway/channel code changed after the cron run.

queue.title: Store, data, session, and ownership-boundary specs
queue.reason: Data, telemetry, and project/workflow changes can shift canonical ownership boundaries.

queue.title: Web Annotations spec/PRD branch and uncommitted docs triage
queue.reason: Separate Web Annotations work exists on another Ralph branch/worktree. Do not merge it blindly; document whether this loop should ignore, reference, or wait.

queue.title: Full source-marked spec inventory and final stale sweep
queue.reason: After high-risk areas, perform a broad inventory to catch remaining source-backed specs that changed since 2026-05-11.

completed.title: Project and Workflow source-backed specs
notes: Source-backed capability specs were refreshed for configured workflow Project Sessions, explicit workflow start, workflow snapshots/runs/waits/human actions, richer Workflow/XState session view panels, workflow package definition-hash export, schema version 3, and catalog/editor store entities.
Workflow System V1 and Workflow UI Authoring V2 change specs were classified as mixed current/future and preserved as target/change specs rather than rewritten to current implementation.

completed.title: Signals, debug, and runtime observability telemetry specs
notes: Session Signals spec refreshed for source-backed activeTelemetry hints that are derived from signal nodes and queue depth while omitting payload content.
Debug CLI spec refreshed from planned telemetry language to current telemetry, web, and PTY debug surfaces, including provider payload-unavailable diagnostics.
Runtime Observability Telemetry spec refreshed with current implementation sources, CLI payload command, and source-backed traceability/verification basis.
Observability Debug Telemetry change spec classified as proposal-time baseline plus implemented V1; current-code behavior remains owned by capability specs.

completed.title: Skills, context build, runtime/profile/plugin surfaces
notes: Core plugin spec refreshed for the expanded built-in skill set and Pibo Native Tooling context registration/selection.
Plugin registry spec refreshed for Ralph stop-condition registration and catalog metadata.
Runtime assembly spec refreshed for current Build Context inspection snapshots.
Chat Web Context Area spec refreshed for the sixth Build Context panel and View Context navigation.
Context Build Inspector change spec classified as implemented current code; tasks and traceability updated while preserving proposal-time Current sections as historical baseline.
User Skills spec refreshed for current user-home root behavior and stronger conflict/rollback wording.

completed.title: Gateway, channel, CLI, PTY, and operator specs
notes: Channel and local gateway specs were refreshed for current PiboChannelContext methods covering yielded-run snapshots, signal trees, profile creation, and Ralph stop-condition discovery.
Operator CLI spec was refreshed for the current pibo tui:sessions root-owned command and direct help path.

CLI Session UI spec was refreshed from target-only language to current implemented Ink session UI behavior, local/direct source behavior, slash commands, redaction, non-TTY rejection, and test evidence.

CLI PTY Validation and PTY Debug change specs were refreshed for implemented pibo debug pty run/scenario/list-scenarios, host and Docker Python PTY backends, artifacts, real-provider safety, and the built-in CLI Session UI mocked scenario.

PTY PRD files were treated as implementation-planning context; proposal/design/spec/tasks were updated to current implementation while remaining Docker smoke and custom-agent scenario extensions stay as documented follow-up gaps.

staleFindings.summary: Projects spec still described simple-chat-only Project workflow creation, but current code supports configured workflow-backed Project Sessions from published catalog versions plus explicit run start.
Workflow package spec omitted definition-hash exports, UI published-version registry validation, schema version 3, and catalog/editor store entities.

Workflow session view spec described a minimal read-only projection; current view includes configured-session execution context, run inspection, definition links, nested links, pending human actions, lifecycle-derived histories, attempts, transfers, and runtime errors.
XState view spec needed current configured-session/run-inspection context and Workflows-tab authoring boundary language.
Workflow System V1 and Workflow UI Authoring V2 change specs are mixed current/future target specs. They were not rewritten to current code during this source-backed capability refresh.
Session Signals spec omitted current activeTelemetry hints populated from active signal nodes and queue depth.
Debug CLI spec still described telemetry as planned and omitted the current telemetry payload-unavailable command plus root web and PTY debug branches.
Runtime Observability Telemetry spec lacked current implementation-source summary, provider payload command coverage, and source-backed traceability/verification rows after V1 landed.
Change spec Current sections described the proposal-time baseline, while its traceability table still marked implemented V1 telemetry work as pending.
Core plugin spec described only the Pi Agent Harness built-in skill and omitted the current built-in skill set plus Pibo Native Tooling context registration and base-profile selection.
Plugin registry spec omitted current Ralph stop-condition registration, validation, plugin attribution, and capability catalog metadata.
Runtime assembly spec covered profile inspection but omitted the implemented read-only redacted Build Context snapshot inspector and Chat Web endpoint/UI integration.
Chat Web Context Area spec still described five panels and omitted the current Build Context panel, View Context navigation, and selected-session route state.
Context Build Inspector change spec and task checklist still marked the work as draft/pending even though current code implements the backend snapshot, authenticated API, UI, and core tests.

User Skills spec treated local storage root and conflict behavior ambiguously; current CLI and Chat Web both use os.homedir(), and Chat Web rejects or rolls back catalog name conflicts on create/install/enable/rename.

Channel context specs omitted current yielded-run snapshots, signal-tree inspection/subscription, profile creation, and Ralph stop-condition discovery methods exposed by PiboChannelContext and PiboGatewayServer.createChannelContext.
Operator CLI spec omitted the current pibo tui:sessions command, direct --help handling, command options, and root discovery coverage.

CLI Session UI spec still described target behavior and unchecked criteria, while current code implements pibo tui:sessions with Ink rendering, local/direct and fake sources, slash commands, redacted recovery messages, bounded rendering, and non-TTY rejection.

CLI PTY Validation spec described desired PTY capability but omitted current pibo debug pty run/scenario/list-scenarios, host and Docker Python PTY backends, artifacts, real-provider safety, and built-in mocked CLI Session UI scenario.

PTY Debug change proposal/spec/design/tasks were still marked draft/pending after the current implementation landed; Docker smoke coverage and custom-agent scenario checks remain follow-up gaps rather than blockers.

updatedSpecs.summary: Refreshed current Projects workflow behavior for published workflow catalog selection, configured workflow sessions, immutable snapshots, explicit one-run start, bootstrap workflow enrichment, and verification notes.
Added definition-hash export, published-version registry validation, schema version 3, catalog/editor store entities, and updated package test inventory.
Updated high-level Workflow session view contract for richer configured-session context and clarified that detailed component behavior is owned by the XState view spec.
Refreshed XState view behavior for configured/run lifecycle detection, execution shell, run inspection, pending human actions, definition links, and Workflows-tab authoring boundary.
Added source-backed activeTelemetry hint behavior, acceptance criteria, success criterion, traceability, and verification evidence.
Refreshed current Debug CLI behavior for implemented telemetry drill-down, provider payload-unavailable diagnostics, root web/PTY branches, and telemetry source/test traceability.
Refreshed current telemetry implementation sources, CLI payload command, source-backed traceability statuses, and verification basis.
Clarified proposal-time baseline versus current code and marked V1 telemetry traceability rows as implemented with source/test evidence.
Refreshed core plugin current behavior for expanded built-in skills, Pibo Native Tooling context registration, base-profile context selection, traceability, and verification basis.
Added Ralph stop-condition registration, validation, plugin attribution, and capability catalog behavior.
Added current Build Context snapshot inspection behavior, Chat Web endpoint/UI integration, redaction, ordering, and verification evidence.
Refreshed Context area current behavior for the Build Context panel, View Context navigation, and selected-session route state.
Marked the change spec implemented, updated background and traceability to current source evidence, and preserved historical proposal-time Current sections.
Checked implemented backend, API, UI, acceptance, and covered test tasks while leaving missing focused validation tests open.
Clarified current user-home storage root and Chat Web catalog conflict rejection/rollback behavior with updated verification basis.
Refreshed current channel context behavior for yielded-run snapshots, signal-tree inspection/subscription, profile creation, Ralph stop-condition discovery, and source-backed traceability.
Refreshed local gateway channel-context language for current runtime status, yielded-run, signal, profile, capability, and Ralph discovery methods.
Added current pibo tui:sessions command/help behavior, options, root discovery coverage, and source/test traceability.
Refreshed target-only CLI Session UI spec to current implemented pibo tui:sessions behavior, local/direct source behavior, slash commands, redaction, non-TTY rejection, and verification basis.
Refreshed current pibo debug pty behavior for run/scenario/list-scenarios, host and Docker Python PTY backends, artifacts, real-provider safety, and built-in mocked CLI Session UI scenario.
Marked PTY debug proposal implemented and added source-backed notes plus remaining Docker smoke gap.
Marked PTY debug change spec done with current implementation summary, checked implemented success criteria, and verification basis.
Updated design from open choices to implemented Python PTY host/Docker backend details and remaining follow-up choices.
Checked implemented PTY debug tasks and recorded remaining Docker smoke and custom-agent scenario follow-ups.

commits.message: docs: refresh skills context runtime specs

runNotes.note: Initial ledger created before starting Ralph.
Audited q-project-workflow. Updated source-backed capability specs and preserved Workflow System V1 / Workflow UI Authoring V2 change specs as mixed current/future target specs.
Recorded commit 9df6b85 for q-project-workflow source-spec refresh.

Audited q-signals-telemetry. Updated session signals, debug CLI, runtime telemetry capability specs, and clarified the observability telemetry change spec as proposal-time baseline with implemented V1 traceability.
Recorded commit d0888dc for q-signals-telemetry source-spec refresh.

Audited q-skills-context-runtime. Updated user skills, core plugin built-in skills/native tooling, plugin registry Ralph stop conditions, runtime Build Context inspection, Chat Web Context area, and Context Build Inspector change spec/tasks.
Recorded commit 68f30dc for q-skills-context-runtime source-spec refresh.

Audited q-gateway-channel-cli. Updated channel, gateway, operator CLI, CLI Session UI, CLI PTY Validation, and PTY Debug change docs against current source; preserved PTY Docker/custom-agent scenario gaps as follow-up test gaps.
